creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text:
upon compile, mariadb103-server most recent update  to Mariadb 10.3.10 chokes as follows:

[ 94%] Building CXX object storage/connect/CMakeFiles/connect.dir/cmgoconn.cpp.o
cd /usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/storage/connect && /usr/local/bin/clang++70  -DCMGO_SUPPORT -DFORCE_INIT_OF_VARS -DGZ_SUPPORT -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DHUGE_SUPPORT -DLIBXML2_SUPPORT -DLINUX -DMARIADB -DMYSQL_DYNAMIC_PLUGIN -DNOCRYPT -DODBC_SUPPORT -DUBUNTU -DUNIX -DVCT_SUPPORT -DXMAP -DZIP_SUPPORT -Dconnect_EXPORTS -I/usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/include -I/usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/sql -I/usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/pcre -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/libxml2 -I/usr/local/include/libmongoc-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/libbson-1.0 -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -fstack-protector --param=ssp-buffer-size=4 -fno-rtti -Wall -Wmissing-declarations -Wno-unused-function -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-value -Wno-parentheses -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wno-implicit-fallthrough -fpermissive -fexceptions -fPIC  -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -DDBUG_OFF -fPIC -o CMakeFiles/connect.dir/cmgoconn.cpp.o -c /usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/storage/connect/cmgoconn.cpp
clang-7: warning: -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now: 'linker' input unused [-Wunused-command-line-argument]
/usr/ports/databases/mariadb103-server/work/mariadb-10.3.10/storage/connect/cmgoconn.cpp:768:11: error: call to member function 'SetValue' is ambiguous

                        ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~

                        value->SetValue(bson_iter_date_time(&Desc) / 1000);
                        ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~
